1	#!/usr/bin/env python3
     2	import os
     3	import sys
     4	from pathlib import Path
     5	
     6	import io
     7	
     8	OUT_DIR = Path('/_outputs/pdf_task_output')
     9	TABLES_DIR = OUT_DIR / 'tables'
    10	OUT_DIR.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    11	TABLES_DIR.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    12	
    13	PDFS = [
    14	    ('attention', '/test_demo/pdfs/attention.pdf'),
    15	    ('gpt4', '/test_demo/pdfs/gpt4.pdf')
    16	]
    17	
    18	use_ocr = False
    19	
    20	# Try to import pdfplumber, pandas, pypdf, pytesseract/pdf2image if available
    21	try:
    22	    import pdfplumber
    23	except Exception as e:
    24	    print('pdfplumber not available:', e, file=sys.stderr)
    25	    sys.exit(1)
    26	
    27	try:
    28	    import pandas as pd
    29	except Exception as e:
    30	    print('pandas not available:', e, file=sys.stderr)
    31	    sys.exit(1)
    32	
    33	try:
    34	    from pypdf import PdfReader, PdfWriter
    35	except Exception as e:
    36	    # Try pypdf from PyPDF2
    37	    try:
    38	        from PyPDF2 import PdfReader, PdfWriter
    39	    except Exception as e2:
    40	        print('pypdf/PyPDF2 not available:', e2, file=sys.stderr)
    41	        sys.exit(1)
    42	
    43	# OCR libraries
    44	have_ocr = True
    45	try:
    46	    import pytesseract
    47	    from pdf2image import convert_from_path
    48	except Exception:
    49	    have_ocr = False
    50	
    51	for short, path in PDFS:
    52	    txt_out = OUT_DIR / f'{short}.txt'
    53	    tables_prefix = TABLES_DIR / f'{short}_table'
    54	
    55	    text_parts = []
    56	    table_count = 0
    57	    ocr_pages = []
    58	
    59	    with pdfplumber.open(path) as pdf:
    60	        for i, page in enumerate(pdf.pages, start=1):
    61	            # Extract text
    62	            page_text = page.extract_text()
    63	            if not page_text or len(page_text.strip()) == 0:
    64	                # Try OCR if available
    65	                if have_ocr:
    66	                    try:
    67	                        images = convert_from_path(path, first_page=i, last_page=i)
    68	                        if images:
    69	                            ocr_text = pytesseract.image_to_string(images[0])
    70	                            page_text = ocr_text
    71	                            ocr_pages.append(i)
    72	                    except Exception as e:
    73	                        # OCR failed for this page
    74	                        page_text = ''
    75	                else:
    76	                    page_text = ''
    77	
    78	            text_parts.append(f'----PAGE {i}----\n')
    79	            text_parts.append(page_text or '')
    80	            text_parts.append('\n\n')
    81	
    82	            # Extract tables
    83	            try:
    84	                tables = page.extract_tables()
    85	            except Exception as e:
    86	                tables = []
    87	            for t in (tables or []):
    88	                # Convert to DataFrame if possible
    89	                table_count += 1
    90	                # t is list of rows (list of lists)
    91	                # Some rows may be None; coerce to empty strings
    92	                rows = [[(cell if cell is not None else '') for cell in row] for row in t]
    93	                # Choose header if first row seems header (heuristic: contains non-numeric)
    94	                df = None
    95	                if len(rows) >= 2:
    96	                    df = pd.DataFrame(rows[1:], columns=rows[0])
    97	                else:
    98	                    df = pd.DataFrame(rows)
    99	                csv_path = TABLES_DIR / f'{short}_table{table_count}.csv'
   100	                # Save without index, preserve formatting
   101	                df.to_csv(csv_path, index=False)
   102	
   103	    with open(txt_out, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
   104	        f.write(''.join(text_parts))
   105	
   106	    # record ocr info
   107	    if ocr_pages:
   108	        with open(OUT_DIR / f'{short}_ocr_note.txt', 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
   109	            f.write(f'OCR performed on pages: {ocr_pages}\n')
   110	
   111	# Merge PDFs into one normalized PDF
   112	merged_path = OUT_DIR / 'merged_documents.pdf'
   113	writer = PdfWriter()
   114	for short, path in PDFS:
   115	    try:
   116	        reader = PdfReader(path)
   117	        for p in reader.pages:
   118	            writer.add_page(p)
   119	    except Exception as e:
   120	        print('Failed to read', path, e, file=sys.stderr)
   121	with open(merged_path, 'wb') as f:
   122	    writer.write(f)
   123	
   124	print('Done')
